disclaimer: Synthetic illustrative inputs. Not dataset samples, not evidence.

images.name: text_overlay_success
images.note: Distracting word over an object blob. Mock demo: the text-driven prediction is repaired to the object after CIC neutralization.

images.name: semantic_decoy_success
images.note: Decoy object word competing with the central object. Mock demo: prediction is repaired to the object after CIC neutralization.

images.name: coco_text_directional
images.note: Scene-text band, like directional/street signage over an object. Mock demo: a finite-candidate case where neutralization does NOT yield a confident repair -- CIC is not guaranteed open-world shortcut discovery.

images.name: failure_abstain
images.note: High-confidence text shortcut over an ambiguous object. Mock demo: neutralization is unstable so the reliability gate ABSTAINS instead of trusting it.
